title: Chronos-ESM: a differentiable, GPU-ready Earth System Model
description: Chronos-ESM is a fully differentiable, coupled Earth System Model (ocean, atmosphere, land, sea ice) implemented in JAX at T31 (~3.75 degree) resolution, designed for high-performance climate simulation and gradient-based tuning on GPU/TPU. The v0.1.0 research preview demonstrates a multi-level dinosaur spectral atmosphere, a CO2 forcing response, a verified AMOC tipping point, and a mid-Holocene (6 ka) paleoclimate run with a real seasonal cycle.

creators.name: Fallah, Bijan
creators.affiliation: Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK)
